conservative.name: Bestial Transformation
conservative.requirements: 7 power, humanoid target within close range. You must have the ability to assume beastform

success.description: Your target assumes the form of a beast. Choose the beastform card of the beast who's form you can assume - the target can only use the physical characteristics of skills shown on the card. While in beastform, he can only use spells with the Beastform trait and cannot speak. He resumes his normal form when you or he are knocked unconscious or killed, or when the act ends or you voluntarily end the spell as a manoeuvre. In any case, this card will not recharge until the end of the act.

boon.description: You may heal or inflict 1 normal wound on the target as he changes form

chaosStar.description: You lose the ability to end the spell. It ends only when it suits the whim of the Changer of Ways (but lasts at least 1 act)
